violations.text: The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black.Sanitizing solution at 3 bay sink was set up during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2025
Chemicals were stored on the same shelf with food/equipment/single service articles in the (back storage area). Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2025

The door to the outside, located in the back kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2024
